title: Glitter Colorful 6th Birthday Candle, Birthday Number 6 Candle Cake Toppers for Girl Women, Glitter Colorful Themed Party Decorations Supplies Birthday Gifts
features: Glitter Colorful Birthday Candles Vibrant Colors - Colorful birthday candles have an elegant and stylish look. Each candle has fine glitter sequins in bright colours for a sophisticated and glamorous look, which can be paired with any cake or cupcake topper for a stylish and stand out birthday cake

Colorful Birthday Cake Candle High Quality Material - Our glitter colorful cake candles are made of high quality materials, balancing beauty and safety, you can rest assured that they are safe to use; suitable for any birthday party decoration or any celebration

Ideal Size for Cake Toppers - The birthday candles are approx. 4 inches / 10 cm long; the width is approx. 1.57 inches / 4 cm; number 6 candles; ideal cake topper for most birthday cakes and wedding cakes; please make sure you measure before purchasing to enjoy the exquisite cake and candle combination

Create a Festive Atmosphere - This glittery colorful cake topper is the perfect cake topper for celebrating birthdays, anniversaries, baby showers, weddings, Hawaiian parties, Christmas, and all kinds of themed parties and more. Create a festive atmosphere during celebrations and bring more joy to the holidays

Glitter Colorful Birthday Party Decorations for Most Occasions - These glittering colorful cake candles can be easily matched with various themes and colours of party cake. Not only is it suitable for birthday celebrations, it is also the ideal cake topper for girls birthday parties, baby showers, anniversaries, retirement parties, family gatherings, weddings, Halloween parties, luau parties and even Christmas and various other occasions, which can bring you a memorable and meaningful party
